name: Magic Triangle of the Ice Barrier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>方</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Triangle Formation of the Ice Barrier
desc: Reveal 3 "Ice Barrier" monsters with different names in your hand, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Ice Barrier" monster from your hand.
eff: Reveal 3 "Ice Barrier" monsters with different names in your hand, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Ice Barrier" monster from your hand.
